texto: Doubt is an uncomfortable condition, full of unknowns, asking questions but raising possibilities.
explicacao: Citação de Florian Armas sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Doubt is an uncomfortable condition, full of unknowns, asking questions but raising possibilities.” articula reflexao, doubt, uncomfortable em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: Doubt is an uncomfortable condition, full of unknowns, asking questions but raising possibilities.

texto: They have cast my life like dice, in a game that is not a game. The unusual erupted into my life like a storm; I mean unusual in my actual perception of things. Do not mistake me; I never desired things that are certainly harder to bear, and nobody asked me if I really wanted an extraordinary life. That is not entirely true; I was asked, in the way a child seeing a cake is asked if he really wants to eat it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Florian Armas: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “They have cast my life like dice, in a game that is not a game. The unusual erupted into my life …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, destiny, dreams pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e dreams.

Do not mistake me; I never desired things that are certainly harder to bear, and nobody asked me if I really wanted an extraordinary life. That is not entirely true; I was asked, in the way a child seeing a cake is asked if he really wants to eat it.
